title: geography — subprocessors
description: IP geolocation engages one true subprocessor (ip-api.com). MaxMind GeoLite2 runs locally as a binary DB — not a subprocessor. Vendor package `nnjeim/world` operates entirely offline once the seed is loaded.

subprocessors.name: ip-api.com
subprocessors.purpose: Fallback IP→location resolver when the local MaxMind GeoLite2 database is unavailable or produces no result.
data_processed: no other user or tenant context sent
subprocessors.location: Undisclosed (public API; free tier 45 req/min per source IP)
subprocessors.legal_basis: contract (implicit via terms of service; free tier)
subprocessors.opt_out: Provision GeoLite2-City.mmdb + set MAXMIND_LICENSE_KEY to keep resolution local. When both provisioned + fresh, ip-api.com is never called.

not_subprocessors.name: MaxMind GeoLite2
not_subprocessors.reason: Binary DB shipped as a file at storage/app/geoip/GeoLite2-City.mmdb. No network traffic during resolution — it's a local binary lookup. Refresh once/week downloads a new DB file from MaxMind's CDN which IS a data transfer, but of a public reference dataset (no personal data leaves our infra).

not_subprocessors.name: nnjeim/world seeder
not_subprocessors.reason: One-time offline load of a public reference dataset. No ongoing communication.
